Operations for managing releases
Lists releases in a given delivery pipeline.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Operations for managing deployment targets
Lists targets in a given project and location.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Deploy Create a target

request.name: Google Cloud Deploy Create a target

description.content: Creates a new target in a given project and location.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
(Required)

The Cloud Deploy API provides programmatic access to manage delivery pipelines, targets, releases, and rollouts for continuous delivery workflows on Google Cloud. It supports promoting releases through target environments with approval gates and rollback capabilities.
